The '''Tertiary Moon of Blimph''', also known as '''Blimph 3''', was a tradeworld, a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] from which the indigenous [[Jokhalli]] drove [[Quaffug]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

{{Moon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Bounty Hunters: Scoundrel's Wages]]'' {{1st}}
